name: Upside Down Apple Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour melted butter into a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Arrange the sliced apples over the butter in the pan, then sprinkle with brown sugar and set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the melted margarine, molasses, sugar, and egg for the gingerbread mixture. Mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, salt, and nutmeg.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the gingerbread mixture alternately with hot tea, mixing well after each addition.
6. Pour the batter evenly over the apples in the pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cooling for 3-5 minutes. Loosen the sides of the cake and carefully invert it onto a serving plate.
9. Serve warm.
